positive: A stylized, whimsical portrait of a majestic mountain lion (cougar) looking directly at the viewer. The cougar is rendered in a clean silhouette style, filled with intricate geometric line art and forest flora elements like ferns and dappled leaves. The background is minimalist and abstract, using complementary colors like deep teal and burnt orange to make the subject pop. The composition is perfectly centered for a symmetrical apparel print. Use thick, crisp lines and flat, graphic color blocking for high contrast and print readability. Style: Modern graphic design, inspired by Art Deco and woodcut engraving. Lighting: Flat, even, graphic lighting. Details: Vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: realistic, photograph, hyperrealism, blurry, grainy, noise, signature, logo, text, watermark, bad anatomy, artifacts, disfigured, extra limbs, multiple subjects, low detail, busy background
